name: io.github.techmanual-ai/agentlink-visa
title: AgentLink-Visa
description: Direct AI agent control of test and measurement equipment via VISA. Connect, query, and write SCPI commands to oscilloscopes, spectrum analyzers, power supplies, and other VISA-compatible instruments.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTLINK_CONFIG_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory containing instrument TOML config files. Defaults to ~/.agentlink/instruments/ if not set.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTLINK_VISA_BACKEND
environmentVariables.description: PyVISA backend. Defaults to '@py' (pyvisa-py, pure-Python, no NI-VISA required). Set to '@ni' to use NI-VISA.
